name: Accredited Vibe Coding Course — Automated Pipeline (Module 13)
description: Full CI/CD automation: code → test → commit → PR → deploy, with guardrails

PreToolUse.description: Pre-commit hook: run tests and scan for secrets
PreToolUse.command: npm run test && ./scripts/scan-for-secrets.sh || (echo 'Pre-commit hook failed: tests failed or secrets detected'; exit 1)

PostToolUse.description: Post-push hook: verify Vercel deploy started
PostToolUse.command: echo 'Pushed to main — Vercel auto-deploy starting...'; sleep 5; vercel logs --verbose --follow --limit 20 2>/dev/null || echo 'Vercel logs not available; check https://vercel.com/'
